# Magnetic Susceptibility

**Summary**: The degree to which a material becomes magnetized in a magnetic field.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-akomolafe|Akomolafe, 2024]] evaluated the impact of hematite's high magnetic susceptibility on NMR relaxation.

## Key Results and Findings

- Hematite increased magnetic susceptibility, leading to accelerated relaxation and a shift toward shorter T2 times below 1 ms. ([[2024-akomolafe|Akomolafe, 2024, p. 76]])
